user.title: Connect to Lucia Agent
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Lucia agent.

data_description.repository: The URL of your Lucia agent (e.g., http://localhost:5000)
data_description.api_key: The API key for authenticating with your Lucia agent (optional)
data_description.verify_ssl: Enable SSL certificate verification (disable for self-signed certs)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Lucia agent. Please check the URL and API key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Lucia agent is already configured.

data_description.prompt_override: Optional: override the default system prompt sent with each request. Supports Jinja2 templates.

send_message.name: Send Message
send_message.description: Send a message to the Lucia agent.

message.name: Message
message.description: The message to send to the agent.
